message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.reset_index parity (frankenpandas-zuvm)

Series::reset_index(drop) replaces the index with a 0..len RangeIndex
when drop=true — the common idiom when callers want to collapse a
labeled Series back to positional indexing. Values and name are
preserved.

drop=false isn't supported in the Series return shape (pandas widens
to a two-column DataFrame in that mode); rather than silently
dropping the old index information, this path returns
CompatibilityRejected with a clear hint pointing at
to_frame()?.reset_index(false) as the escape hatch.

Two tests: drop=true round-trip and drop=false rejection with the
hint message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
